input_text: Elephants have trunks or tails. Penguins happily live in water. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Mary visited London in September. Apparently, Tom left early. Dole was defeated by Clinton. The teacher showed the students a map. The glass was broken by the boy. John is a fox. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. The blue hand of a man moved the wheel of the large wheelbarrow. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. The mouse was chased by the cat. The city was destroyed. Sandra travelled to the office. Riga is not in Estonia. The students saw a map?
